name: backupmaster

metadata.name: backupmaster
metadata.summary: Backup import files across entire disk

documentation:
# Backup
[![PyPI version](https://badge.fury.io/py/backupmaster.svg)](https://badge.fury.io/py/backupmaster)
![PyPI downloads](https://img.shields.io/pypi/dm/backupmaster)
![Python version](https://img.shields.io/badge/python-3.10+-brightgreen)
![Operating system](https://img.shields.io/badge/os-linux-brightgreen)
![Coverage](https://img.shields.io/badge/coverage-100%25-brightgreen)

Back up import files across entire disk
- Scale to huge number of files
- Detailed configuration possibilities to maximize performance
- Perfect for files that are too volatile for a VCS like GIT and too important to lose

## Usage

Run
```shell
backup
```
## Installation
```shell
pip install backupmaster
```

methods.name: backup.models.path.Path.mtime
documentation:
Remote filesystem is only precise up to one second and mtime is used to compare
files.

methods.name: backup.backup.commands.Backup.update_paths_without_change
documentation: Update modified times to avoid checking again in the future.

functions.name: backup.main.main.main
documentation: Backup important files across entire disk.
